rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Elec. Code §141.001 governs candidate eligibility for public office. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and do not interact.
quote: Sec. 141.001. ELIGIBILITY REQUIREMENTS FOR PUBLIC OFFICE. (a) To be eligible to be a candidate for, or elected or appointed to, a public elective office in this state, a person must:
_note: No relationship between proposed homestead exemption increase and election eligibility statute.
